data.Description (en): Hydration is a next-gen DeFi protocol which is designed to bring omnipool liquidity to the Polkadot ecosystem. Hydration enables efficient trading, liquidity provisioning, and DeFi applications on Polkadot.
data.Description (zh): Hydration 是新一代 DeFi 协议，旨在为 Polkadot 生态系统带来全池流动性。Hydration 在 Polkadot 上实现高效交易、流动性提供和 DeFi 应用程序。
